summary.interpretation_note: Mechanically passes the preregistered replication path because CI upper is below 0.015, but baseline accuracy is zero, so paper claims must not treat this as evidence of preserved capability headroom.
Partial cross-family validation only; does not complete Qwen3.6/Kimi Linear validation and must not be described as full cross-validation.
Pure-Transformer control is dynamic at the same scale as Granite/Nemotron; paper must not frame migration as Mamba-2-specific.
Decomposition now includes pure-Transformer Phase 5 prime, so set-leaving/rank-shuffling is a broader decode-rank-dynamics decomposition rather than Mamba-specific.
Top-1% decomposition is stable through top-2% for all packets; top-5% changes the component split and should be reported as sensitivity, not the main operating point.

killed_entries.reason: native profiler summaries show less than 1% recoverable gain; no distinct boundary-local signal
0 of 36 Mamba layers met both preregistered KS p<0.01 and median drift ratio >=2.0; pass fraction 0.0 < 0.5.
mean relative NMSE reduction 0.07133119147037506 missed the preregistered 0.10 shelf; CI95=[0.06882070525106689, 0.073901076081768] and method was non-worse at both positions.
predicted/measured ratios exceeded the preregistered >5.0 kill threshold at depths 1, 10, and 15; ratios were 5.2348196795166055, 5.724405940898007, and 6.922192012041549.
full residual 95th-percentile clipping caused accuracy_drop=0.08333333333333333 on Granite-4.0-H-Small, exceeding the preregistered 0.015 kill threshold.
median recovery 0.0 was below the preregistered 0.20 kill threshold; artifact_complete=true and no control-stop fired.
primary median recovery 0.0 was below the preregistered 0.20 kill floor; CI95 high was 0.06954064195470389 and no-gap fraction was 0.375.

infra_failed_entries.reason: no supported vLLM decode micro-operation replacement hook or serving-side DMC integration exists; current packet contains zero real serving rows
